name: PET-CT Chest
description: PET-CT of the chest for metabolic evaluation and staging

findings.technique: PET-CT of the chest was performed with FDG injection.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Lungs
sections.content: Lungs [no FDG-avid nodules / no abnormal metabolic activity]. No mass with elevated SUV.

sections.name: Mediastinum
sections.content: Mediastinal lymph nodes [no abnormal FDG uptake / no pathologic adenopathy].

sections.name: Bone
sections.content: Skeleton [no focal FDG-avid lesions to suggest metastasis].

impression:
1. No FDG-avid pulmonary lesions.
2. No pathologic lymph nodes.
3. No evidence of metastatic disease.
